1057.issue: [E1057] admin 6.17.14 listed as dependency but 7.6.17 is required as minimum, 7.6.20 is recommended. Please update globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/blob/master/io-package.json).

5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (src/lib/MQTTServer.ts). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (src/lib/MQTTServer.ts, src/main.ts). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "tls" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:tls" instead.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (src/lib/MQTTClient.ts, src/lib/MQTTServer.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/blob/master/io-package.json).

5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.

5606.issue: [W5606] i18n "admin/i18n" seems to contain untranslated entries identical to English (>5 words). Affected languages: es (1 key, example: Use different topic names for set and get:); fr (1 key, example: Use different topic names for set and get:); it (1 key, example: Use different topic names for set and get:); nl (1 key, example: Use different topic names for set and get:); pl (1 key, example: Use different topic names for set and get:); pt (1 key, example: Use different topic names for set and get:).

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/serverTab/items/ignoredTopics" attribute "help" uses key "These topics will be ignored on receiving (Divided by comma, e.g. 'mqtt.0.*,javascript.*')" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("github-actions", "npm") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

0065.issue: [S0065] No devDependency for "@types/node" found. Consider adding "@types/node":">=22" to devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/blob/master/package.json).

0085.issue: [S0085] No devDependency "@tsconfig/nodeXX" found. Consider adding one for proper type checking (see ioBroker.examples for examples).

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0063.issue: [W0063] "@types/mocha, mocha" are included in "@iobroker/testing". Remove from devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.mqtt/blob/master/package.json)
